name: Radio Guest Interview
description: 30-minute pre-show conversation with Rebecca Price of Morning Reflections on WGSP 1490 AM. We'll discuss your story and how it fits the show's theme before scheduling your on-air segment.

name: Clergy Peer Check-In
description: 45-minute pastoral peer conversation. Open to fellow chaplains, ministers, and faith leaders for collegial support, CPE discussion, or collaborative planning.

name: Sponsor Coordination Call
description: 20-minute call to align on upcoming ad reads, event mentions, or partnership details for Morning Reflections on WGSP 1490 AM.

name: CPE Resident Check-In
description: One-hour supervision and mentoring session for CPE residents at Bluff City Medical Center. Bring your verbatims, reflections, and questions.

name: Church Health Fair Volunteer Slot
description: 15-minute volunteer sign-up slot for the Grace Community Church community health fair. Booking is now closed - thank you to everyone who signed up.
